problem: Why do traumatic memories become locked and intrusive — what neural mechanism?
mechanism: Transcranial magnetic stimulation of specific cortical area
hypothesis: The key to Why do traumatic memories become locked and intrusive — what neural mechanism? is Transcranial magnetic stimulation of specific cortical area — specifically Transcranial magnetic stimulation — which would help 12,000,000 people affected.

experiment.protocol: Optogenetic mouse model with 13 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: What we observe is not nature itself but nature exposed to our method of questioning. — Heisenberg
